title: EchoSMs anatomical datastore schema
description:
This schema defines a structure for storing fish and plankton acoustic scattering model data, mainly for input to the echoSMs anatomical datastore.

The reference version of the schema (formatted as a JSON-schema file) will always be available in the echoSMs github [repository](https://github.com/ices-tools-dev/echoSMs/tree/main/data_store/schema).

license.description: The license that applies to this specimen data. Only some Creative Commons licenses are permitted (to ensure that the data remain freely available and usable).

oneOf.title: no license
oneOf.description: These data have no license. Use this option as a last resort as it can create uncertainty about how the data can be used. May be appropriate for historical data where the data creater or owner cannot provide a license (although CC0 could be used in that case).

oneOf.title: CC0
oneOf.description: CC Zero. No Copyright. The person who associated a work with this deed has dedicated the work to the public domain by waiving all of his or her rights to the work worldwide under copyright law, including all related and neighboring rights, to the extent allowed by law. You can copy, modify, distribute and perform the work, even for commercial purposes, all without asking permission. Canonical URL: <https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/>.

oneOf.title: CC BY
oneOf.description:
CC BY. You are free to:
 __share__ - copy and redistribute the material in any medium or format for any purpose, even commercially,
 __adapt__ - remix, transform, and build upon the material for any purpose, even commercially.

 __attribution__ - you must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made.
 Canonical URL: <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/>.

oneOf.title: CC BY-SA
oneOf.description:
CC BY. You are free to:
 __share__ - copy and redistribute the material in any medium or format for any purpose, even commercially,
 __adapt__ - remix, transform, and build upon the material for any purpose, even commercially.

 __attribution__ - you must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made,
 __sharealike__ - if you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same license as the original.
 Canonical URL: <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/>.

uuid.description: A Universally Unique IDentifier for this specimen as per [RFC9562](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/rfc9562). Populated by the datastore if empty.

version_number.description: A version number that increments whenever this specimen is updated. Any existing value is overwritten by the datastore.

version_time.description: The timestamp when this specimen dataset was last modified, in [RFC9557](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/rfc9557) format, including the timezone. Any existing timestamp is overwritten by the datastore.

version_note.description: A note about the changes in this version. Can be an empty string but a short note is very much recommended.

version_investigators.description: Names or identifying descriptions of persons or organisations that updated or created this dataset.

dataset_uuid.description: A Universally Unique IDentifier for a dataset as [RFC9562](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/rfc9562). Datasets are used only to group multiple specimens together. They contain no information that is not already in the specimen metadata.

anatomical_category.description: The type of anatomy that this dataset contains.

aphia_id.description: The WoRMS [aphiaID](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php) of the specimen's species. Use a value of 0 if the specimen is not from a species.

class.description: Taxonomical hierarchy level of class that is consistent with WoRMS.

order.description: Taxonomical hierarchy level of order that is consistent with WoRMS.

family.description: Taxonomical hierarchy level of family that is consistent with WoRMS.

genus.description: Taxonomical hierarchy level of genus that is consistent with WoRMS.

species.description: Taxonomical hierarchy level of species that is consistent with WoRMS.

reference.description: A literature reference for the dataset. If available, a DOI or URI is recommended.

activity_name.description: Name of the data collection activity (if any), such as voyage code, project name, etc.

location.description: Name or description of the location where organism was collected.

latitude.description: Latitude of location where organism was collected.

latitude_units.description: Units for latitude. Positive values indicate north of the equator.

longitude.description: Longitude of location where organism was collected.

longitude_units.description: Units for longitude. Positive values indicate east of the prime meridian.

depth.description: Depth below surface of organism collection location.

date_collection.description: The date when the specimen was collected in [RFC9557](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/rfc9557) format. Use an empty string if the date is unknown.

date_image.description: The date when the dataset was imaged, in [RFC9557](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/rfc9557) format.  Use an empty string if the date is unknown.

notes.description: Explanatory notes about the shape data.

imaging_method.description: Method used to obtain the raw image data.

shape_method.description: Method used to obtain the specimen shape.

shape_method_processing.description: Description of processing used to convert raw images into shapes, including any manipulation of image data (for example, smoothing, edge enhancement, rotation, etc).

sound_speed_method.description: Method used to obtain sound speed in the specimen.

oneOf.title: density to sound speed relationship
oneOf.description: Use of an empirical relationship between density and sound speed

oneOf.title: time-of-flight
oneOf.description: Estimated from the time taken for an acoustic pulse to travel from a source to destination transducer through the object being measured

oneOf.title: pulse-echo
oneOf.description: Sound speed is determined by measuring the reflection time from the back of a tissue sample using a single transducer (vs the two used in a typical time-of-flight measurement)

oneOf.title: inverted
oneOf.description: Inferred or inverted from a fitted scattering model or other approach

oneOf.title: literature
oneOf.description: Obtained from an existing publication, report, etc

oneOf.title: unknown
oneOf.description: The method used to estimate the sound speed is unknown

oneOf.title: other
oneOf.description: The method used to estimate the sound speed is not one of the listed methods

mass_density_method.description: Method used to obtain density in the specimen

oneOf.title: CT density
oneOf.description: Conversion of computer tomography Hounsfield unit numbers into density

oneOf.title: liquid displacement
oneOf.description: Division of object mass by it's  volume, measured using liquid displacement

oneOf.title: literature
oneOf.description: Obtained from an existing publication, report, etc

oneOf.title: titration
oneOf.description: Density is determined by mixing two liquids of known densities until the animal reaches neutral buoyancy

oneOf.title: pipette
oneOf.description: Gravimetric displacement that determines an animal's volume by weighing the mass of seawater required to return a graduated cylinder to its original volume after the animal has been added

oneOf.title: dual-density
oneOf.description: Density is calculated by weighing animals in two different fluids of known densities

oneOf.title: from composition
oneOf.description: Weighted average of known densities of an animal's chemical components, such as water, lipids, proteins, and other contribution sources

oneOf.title: inverted
oneOf.description: Inferred or inverted from a fitted scattering model or other approach

oneOf.title: unknown
oneOf.description: The method used to estimate the density is unknown

oneOf.title: other
oneOf.description: The method used to estimate the density is not one of the listed methods

dataset_size.description: Size of the entire dataset (including raw data). Any value is overwritten by the datastore server.

radiograph_perspective.description: The viewpoint of the imaging x-ray machine to the anatomical feature.

radiograph_exposure_time.description: The exposure time setting of the imaging x-ray machine.

radiograph_focal_length.description: Focal length setting of the imaging x-ray machine.

radiograph_kVp.description: The kilovoltage peak setting of the imaging x-ray machine.

radiograph_mA.description: The milliamperage setting of the imaging x-ray machine.

specimen_name.description: A name that identifies the specimen.

specimen_condition.description: Condition of the specimen when it was imaged.

sex.description: Sex of specimen. Is a superset of the ICES AC_Sex vocabulary

length_type.description: Type of length measurement. Is a superset of the ICES AC_LengthMeasurementType vocabulary
enum: CCAMLR krill - front of eye to tip of telson

shape_type.description: Type of shape data used for this specimen.

shapes.description: Data that specifies the shapes in the specimen.

oneOf.title: Outline
oneOf.description: Represents a three-dimensional shape using a dorsal and lateral outline.

height.description: Height of the shape at each centreline point.

width.description: Width of the shape at each centreline point.

mass_density_ratio.description: Ratio of mass densities of the shape and the surrounding material or shape.

sound_speed_ratio.description: Ratio of compressional sound speed of the and the surrounding material or shape.

youngs_modulus.description: Young's modulus, E, of the shape.

oneOf.title: Surface
oneOf.description: Represents a three-dimensional shape using a triangulated mesh.

facets_0.description: Zero-based indices into x, y, and z that define node 0 of a surface triangle.

facets_1.description: Zero-based indices into x, y, and z that define node 1 of a surface triangle.

facets_2.description: Zero-based indices into x, y, and z that define node 2 of a surface triangle.

normals_x.description: x-component of outward-pointing normal vector for each facet.

normals_y.description: y-component of outward-pointing normal vector for each facet.

normals_z.description: z-component of outward-pointing normal vector for each facet.

mass_density_ratio.description: Ratio of mass densities of the shape and the surrounding material or shape.

sound_speed_ratio.description: Ratio of compressional sound speed of the and the surrounding material or shape.

youngs_modulus.description: Young's modulus, E, of the shape.

oneOf.title: Voxel
oneOf.description: Represents a three-dimensional shape using voxels.

voxel_size.description: Voxel size, ordered x, y, z.

oneOf.title: Categorised voxel
oneOf.description: Represents a three-dimensional shape using categorised voxels.

voxel_size.description: Voxel size, ordered x, y, z.

sound_speed_compressional.description: Compressional sound speed of voxel categories.

oneOf.title: Geometric
oneOf.description: Represents a three-dimensional shape fromed by the union of one or more geometric shapes.

sound_speed_compressional.description: Compressional sound speed of the shape.

components.description: The simple geometries that make up this shape.

oneOf.title: Cylinder
oneOf.description: An optionally uniformly bent cylinder. When pitch, roll, and yaw are zero, the cylinder lies along the x-axis of the echoSMs coordinate system.

bend_radius.description: Bend radius of the cylinder, taken along the centreline of the cylinder. Bending occurs in the x-z plane. If this property is absent, the cylinder is not bent.

bend_direction.description: The direction in which the cylinder is bent.

oneOf.title: Up
oneOf.description: The ends of the cylinder will bend upwards (in the echoSMs coordinate system this in the negative z-direction).

oneOf.title: Down
oneOf.description: The ends of the cylinder will bend downwards (in the echoSMs coordinate system this in the positive z-direction).

oneOf.title: Spheroid
oneOf.description: A sphere, prolate spheroid, or oblate spheroid. The polar axis of the spheroid lies along the x-axis of the echoSMs coordinate system (prior to application of any tilt, roll, and yaw). An oblate spheroid occurs when the equatorial radius is greater than the polar radius and a prolate spheroid when the polar radius is greater than the equatorial radius. A sphere is generated when the polar and equatorial radii are the same.

equatorial_radius.description: The equatorial radius of the spheroid. In the echoSMs coordinate system the equatorial radius is along the y- and z-axes.

polar_radius.description: The polar radius of the spheroid. In the echoSMs coordinate system the polar axis is the x-axis.

boundary.description: Type of reflecting boundary for this shape.

length_units.description: Units for lengths, dimensions, and sizes.

orientation_units.description: The units used for pitch, roll, and yaw attributes

pitch.description: The pitch of the shape in the echoSMs coordinate system.

roll.description: The roll of the shape in the echoSMs coordinate system.

yaw.description: The yaw of the shape in the echoSMs coordinate system.

centroid_location.description: The location of the shape's centroid, ordered (x, y, z) as per the echoSMs coordinate system.

anatomical_feature.description: Type of anatomical feature represented by this shape.

shape_straightened.description: Was the shape straightened during the processing.

shape_smoothed.description: Was the shape smoothed during the processing.

shape_rotated.description: Was the shape rotated during the processing.

shape_notes.description: Explanatory notes about the straightening, smoothing, and rotation of the shape.
